info.description: API for managing CyVerse users, LDAP, DataStore, and email notifications.
info.title: Portal Conductor API

get.description: List deletion job analyses, optionally filtered by status (defaults to "Running").
Get the details of a specific deletion job analysis.
Check the status of a user deletion analysis job.

delete.description: Submit a request to delete a user asynchronously from all systems including the database.

post.description: Create user in iRODS / DataStore only (or reset password if user already exists).

get.description: Check whether a username exists in the DataStore.

500.description: Failed to check user existence in data store

post.description: Register DataStore services with the iRODS path and username.

400.description: Either text_body or html_body must be provided

get.description: Retrieve all posixGroup entries in LDAP.

post.description: Create a user entry in LDAP only (without iRODS/DataStore setup).

get.description: Retrieve the LDAP attributes of a user.

put.description: Update the value of a single attribute for an LDAP user.

get.description: Check whether a username exists in LDAP.
Get list of LDAP groups the user belongs to.

post.description: Add a user to a specific LDAP group.

delete.description: Remove a user from a specific LDAP group.

get.description: Retrieve a list of members in a mailing list.

post.description: Subscribe an email address to a mailing list.

delete.description: Unsubscribe an email address from a mailing list.

get.description: Check whether an email address is subscribed to a mailing list.
Get VICE job limits for a specific user.

post.description: Set VICE concurrent-job limit for a specific user.
Create a complete user account in both LDAP (with default groups) and DataStore.

delete.description: Synchronously remove the user from the datastore and LDAP.

post.description: Update the user's password in both LDAP and the datastore.
